user.title: NotebookLM
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Google NotebookLM account.

menu_options.google: Sign in with Google (via add-on, inside Home Assistant)

manual.title: Paste credentials
manual.description: On your computer run `notebooklm login`, then paste the full contents of `~/.notebooklm/profiles/default/storage_state.json` below.

google.title: Sign in with Google
google.description:
1. Install and start the **NotebookLM Login** add-on.
2. Open its Web UI and complete the Google sign-in.
3. When it reports success, press **Submit** below to finish.

notebook.title: Choose a default notebook
notebook.description: Every action (the Ask button, voice intent and services) runs on a default notebook so you never type an ID. Pick one — or type a name below to create a new notebook.

error.invalid_storage_state: That is not a valid storage_state.json (missing the 'cookies' field).
error.invalid_auth: The credentials were rejected by NotebookLM. Sign in again and copy a fresh storage_state.json.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach NotebookLM. Check your connection and try again.
error.addon_result_missing: No login result found yet. Complete the Google sign-in in the add-on first.
error.notebook_required: Pick an existing notebook or type a name to create one.
error.create_failed: Could not create the notebook. Check your connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This NotebookLM account is already configured.
abort.wrong_account: The credentials are for a different Google account than this entry.

data_description.default_notebook: Used by services when no notebook_id is supplied.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to refresh the notebook list and auth status.

documentation.title: Self-documenting Home Assistant
documentation.description: Export a snapshot of your Home Assistant (areas, entities, automations, …) into a NotebookLM notebook so you can ask grounded questions about your own smart home. Re-syncing replaces each section — it never creates duplicates. Secrets, coordinates and tokens are scrubbed before upload.

data.doc_scrub: Scrub emails / IPs / tokens from values

data_description.doc_notebook: Where the snapshot is synced. Pick an existing notebook (or fill the field below to create one).
data_description.create_notebook: If set, a new notebook is created and used instead of the choice above.
data_description.doc_categories: Only the ticked sections are exported and kept in sync.
data_description.doc_scrub: Sensitive keys (passwords, coordinates, tokens) are always removed; this also redacts emails, IP addresses and long tokens found inside free-text values.

error.not_loaded: The integration is not loaded yet. Try again in a moment.
error.create_failed: Could not create the notebook. Check your connection and try again.
error.doc_notebook_required: Pick a documentation notebook or type a name to create one.

config_entry_id.name: Account
config_entry_id.description: Which NotebookLM account to use (optional if only one).

notebook_id.name: Notebook ID
notebook_id.description: Notebook to delete (defaults to the configured default notebook).

list_notebooks.name: List notebooks
list_notebooks.description: Return all notebooks in the account.

add_url.name: Add source: URL
add_url.description: Add a web page or YouTube URL as a source.

notebook_id.name: Notebook ID
notebook_id.description: Target notebook (defaults to the configured default).

wait.name: Wait
wait.description: Wait until the source is processed.

add_text.name: Add source: text
add_text.description: Add pasted text as a source.

add_research.name: Add web/Drive research
add_research.description: Run a research query and import the discovered sources.

source.name: Source
source.description: Search the web or Google Drive.

ask.name: Ask a question
ask.description: Ask the notebook a question and get the answer back.

generate_audio.name: Generate audio overview (podcast)
generate_audio.description: Generate an Audio Overview. Fires a notebooklm_artifact_ready event when done.

wait.name: Wait
wait.description: Block until finished and return the download URL.

generate_video.name: Generate video overview
generate_video.description: Generate a Video Overview. Fires a notebooklm_artifact_ready event when done.

generate_quiz.name: Generate quiz
generate_quiz.description: Generate a quiz from the notebook sources.

generate_flashcards.name: Generate flashcards
generate_flashcards.description: Generate flashcards from the notebook sources.

generate_report.name: Generate report
generate_report.description: Generate a report (briefing doc, study guide, blog post).

generate_data_table.name: Generate data table
generate_data_table.description: Generate a data table from the notebook sources.

download.name: Download artifact
download.description: Download a generated artifact to a file inside Home Assistant.

output_path.name: Output path
output_path.description: Destination path inside an allowed directory.

format.name: Format
format.description: Optional export format (e.g. json, markdown, pptx, csv).

sync_documentation.name: Sync Home Assistant documentation
sync_documentation.description: Export a scrubbed snapshot of Home Assistant and sync it into the documentation notebook. Replaces each section in place (no duplicates).

notebook_id.name: Notebook ID
notebook_id.description: Target notebook (defaults to the configured documentation notebook).

categories.name: Sections
categories.description: Which sections to export (defaults to the configured set).
